# Pinned Python dependencies for the middens technique bridge.
# Generated by: uv pip compile python/requirements.txt
#
# Direct dependencies (the set we actually import):
#   hmmlearn, statsmodels, lifelines, scipy, numpy, pandas,
#   prefixspan, ruptures, networkx
#
# Everything else in this file is a transitive dependency pinned
# to an exact version so that two installs of the same middens
# binary resolve to the same Python stack. To refresh:
#   cd middens && uv pip compile python/requirements.in -o python/requirements.txt
# (or regenerate by extracting the direct set above into a .in file).
